data.title: 国际服例行维护#108 延长
data.summary: [Extended Maintenance Notice] 4/7(Tue) Maintenance has been extended, Sensei. Maintenance is now due
data.body:
[Extended Maintenance Notice]

4/7(Tue) Maintenance has been extended, Sensei.
Maintenance is now due to end at 8:00 AM (UTC)

Additional notices will be provided if there are further delays.
We apologize for the inconvenience.

#BlueArchive
